port.method: rewrite OMX runtime conventions ($macro / omx CLI / .omx/ state) into WorkBuddy idioms (Skill tool, Agent tool, task list, .workbuddy/memory)

skills.name: ai-slop-cleaner
skills.description: Regression-tests-first smell-by-smell deslop/refactor workflow preserving behavior

skills.name: analyze
skills.description: Read-only deep cross-file analysis with ranked, confidence-labeled evidence-vs-inference synthesis

skills.name: ask
skills.description: Run a local Claude/Gemini advisor CLI and capture a reusable artifact

skills.name: ask-claude
skills.description: Deprecated shim; use the ask skill with the claude backend

skills.name: ask-gemini
skills.description: Deprecated shim; use the ask skill with the gemini backend

skills.name: autopilot
skills.description: Strict autonomous loop: deep-interview -> ralplan -> ultragoal -> code-review -> ultraqa with auto re-planning

skills.name: autoresearch
skills.description: Validator-gated stateful research loop that continues until explicit validation evidence exists

skills.name: autoresearch-goal
skills.description: Durable professor-critic research workflow bound to a tracked goal with validation-gated completion

skills.name: best-practice-research
skills.description: Bounded, cited best-practice research using official/upstream evidence before planning

skills.name: build-fix
skills.description: Deprecated shim; build failures handled inline by active execution/debug workflow

skills.name: cancel
skills.description: Abort current WorkBuddy flow: stop agents/processes, clear task list, yield control

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Two-lane severity-rated code review with deterministic merge-readiness verdict

skills.name: configure-notifications
skills.description: Configure Discord/Telegram/Slack/webhook notifications via .workbuddy/notifications.json

skills.name: deep-interview
skills.description: Socratic ambiguity-gated interview that turns vague ideas into execution-ready specs

skills.name: deepsearch
skills.description: Deprecated shim; use analyze skill or repo inspection tools for repo analysis

skills.name: design
skills.description: Maintain repo-local DESIGN.md as the durable product/UI/UX design source of truth

skills.name: doctor
skills.description: Diagnose/fix oh-my-workbuddy install: skill roots, dup/legacy paths, npm version, AGENTS.md/memory

skills.name: ecomode
skills.description: Cost-optimized exec modifier; use ultrawork instead

skills.name: frontend-ui-ux
skills.description: Frontend UI/UX shim; use design or visual-ralph instead

skills.name: git-master
skills.description: Git expert: atomic commits, interactive rebase, branch mgmt, history cleanup, style detection

skills.name: help
skills.description: Help shim; use omx-setup (install) and doctor (troubleshoot) instead

skills.name: hud
skills.description: Inspect live progress via the task list and .workbuddy/memory (replaces omx hud/statusline)

skills.name: note
skills.description: Note shim; persist via .workbuddy/memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md instead

skills.name: omx-setup
skills.description: Install/refresh oh-my-workbuddy skills to ~/.workbuddy/skills or .workbuddy/skills

skills.name: performance-goal
skills.description: Evaluator-gated performance optimization loop with durable .omw artifacts and a pass/fail completion gate

skills.name: pipeline
skills.description: Configurable stage orchestrator sequencing skills (interview->plan->execute->review->QA) via task-list state

skills.name: plan
skills.description: Strategic planning with interview, consensus (Planner->Architect->Critic), and review modes

skills.name: prometheus-strict
skills.description: Clean-room interview-driven planner: Metis clarifies, Momus challenges, Oracle synthesizes, then hands off

skills.name: ralph
skills.description: Persistence loop that works until completion with parallel delegation and mandatory architect verification

skills.name: ralph-init
skills.description: Deprecated shim; use ralph directly after PRD/test-spec planning

skills.name: ralplan
skills.description: Alias for plan --consensus: iterative Planner->Architect->Critic consensus with RALPLAN-DR

skills.name: review
skills.description: Deprecated shim; use code-review or plan --review instead

skills.name: security-review
skills.description: standalone security review; use code-review when security concerns are in scope

skills.name: skill
skills.description: manage local WorkBuddy skills (list, add, remove, search, edit, info, sync, setup)

skills.name: swarm
skills.description: compatibility shim for team execution; use team (Agent-tool coordination) instead

skills.name: tdd
skills.description: TDD shim; keep test-first discipline inside the active implementation workflow

skills.name: team
skills.description: coordinate N parallel agents on a shared task list via the Agent tool

skills.name: trace
skills.description: trace/runtime-inspection shim; use normal repo inspection (Read/Grep/Glob/Bash)

skills.name: ultragoal
skills.description: durable repo-native multi-goal planning with tracked goals, ledger, and steering

skills.name: ultraqa
skills.description: adversarial dynamic e2e QA with hostile scenarios, harnesses, and structured evidence report

skills.name: ultrawork
skills.description: Parallel execution engine: ground context, set acceptance criteria, fan out independent work via the Agent tool, close with lightweight evidence

skills.name: visual-ralph
skills.description: Measured frontend delivery loop from reference/URL with visual-verdict scoring, pixel diff, and a reproducible design system

skills.name: visual-verdict
skills.description: Deprecated; visual verdict scoring is now part of the visual-ralph workflow

skills.name: web-clone
skills.description: Deprecated; live-URL website cloning is now handled by visual-ralph

skills.name: wiki
skills.description: Persistent markdown project wiki with keyword/tag search, lifecycle capture, and [[cross-references]]

skills.name: worker
skills.description: Subagent (Agent tool) task-lifecycle protocol: ACK, claim-safe lifecycle, evidence-backed completion, blocking escalation
